text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's up, City? Somethin' on your mind?
I'm here to listen, so let it all out!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
…Well… I was just thinking, I don't know
anything about kids' fashion…

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Clothes, huh? Well, I like sleeves that're
easy to roll up so I can play in the sand.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, why ya askin' me 'bout kids' clothes?!
I just wear a size small in adult sizes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's not what I meant. For my next job,
I have to do styling on a kids' photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
…Oh yeah, you have younger siblings.
What do they usually wear?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Honestly, we give 'em the simplest clothes we can find. They'll only come home covered in mud anyways!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I see… They'd do best in a natural
environment where they feel comfortable.
But I don't wanna get the costumes dirty…

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
City! City! You're overthinkin' it! You'll scare
the tykes scrunchin' up your face like that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Remember to smile! The kids will be happy
with whatever ya pick for 'em as long as
you look happy stylin' them! I'm sure you're
gonna get some great photos!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo… You're right. Thanks for the advice.
